description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- chore: update low res logos by @zevnda in #1673
- fix(tauri): remove stdout stderr from parse error message logged to file by @zevnda in #1674
- refactor(ui): change search keybind by @zevnda in #1675
- refactor(hooks): initiate updates when app is launched by @zevnda in #1679
- fix(components): start steam polling when modal opens instead of on b… by @zevnda in #1680
- fix(inventory-manager): price fallback logic for list all by @zevnda in #1681
- refactor(i18n): remove unused languages by @zevnda in #1683
- fix(tauri-idling): scope stop_farm_idle to only kill card farming pro… by @zevnda in #1685
- fix(tauri): use atomic writes for all json file persistence by @zevnda in #1686
- refactor(ui): move searchbar to titlebar by @zevnda in #1687
